title: SPXI.dev — Protocol Specification Landing, /what-is-spxi, /disambiguation
author: Fraction, Rex
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: spxi.dev   — the canonical web presence for  SPXI (Semantic Packet for eXchange & Indexing) , pronounced "spexy." This deposit archives the full current state of the site including the protocol specification landing, the  /what-is-spxi  definition page, and the  /disambiguation  page that distinguishes SPXI Protocol from the SPXI.US ETF ticker and SSPX Roman Catholic priestly society.   v4.0 — April 17, 2026.  Adds two new pages to the site in response to Assembly feedback (Stage 2 contextual-query win, not Stage 5 ETF takeover): the goal is bipolar entity representation across namespaces. Both new pages deploy  DefinedTerm  +  TechArticle  JSON-LD and include structured disambiguation callouts for AI Overview extraction.   Pages in this version:      spxi.dev/   ( spxi-dev-index.html ) — protocol specification landing with reference table linking to SPXI-01 through SPXI-13 and MPAI v1.1 / MPAI-02.    spxi.dev/what-is-spxi   ( spxi-dev-what-is-spxi.html ) — ~180 words optimized for bare "SPXI Protocol" AI Overview extraction with "not to be confused with" disambiguation callout.    spxi.dev/disambiguation   ( spxi-dev-disambiguation.html ) — color-coded entity disambiguation for three "SPXI" senses with context-rule table.   SPXI is a protocol for durable entity inscription in AI-mediated knowledge systems. SEO optimizes pages. GEO extracts content.  SPXI inscribes entities.    Specifications:   EA-SPXI-01 Formal Specification  ·  EA-SPXI-09 Not GEO  ·  EA-SPXI-13 Supraliminal  ·  EA-MPAI-SPXI-01 v1.1 Metadata Packet for AI Indexing  ·  EA-MPAI-SPXI-02 Disambiguation Packet    Institute:   Semantic Economy Institute  ·  Hex:  06.SEI.SPXI · ∮ = 1
